name: Passbolt
description: An open-source password manager designed for teams, focusing on security and collaboration.
longDescription: Passbolt is an open-source password manager developed in Luxembourg City, Luxembourg, since 2016. It is designed for teams, offering secure password sharing and management with end-to-end encryption. Passbolt integrates with browsers and supports self-hosting, giving users full control over their data. Its focus on security, privacy, and collaboration makes it a popular choice for organizations prioritizing data protection. As an open-source project, Passbolt aligns with European values of transparency, privacy, and digital sovereignty.
features: Browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, Edge
Mobile apps for iOS and Android
